What's up guys welcome to Woofoo Forms. We are going to be using this form builder for a couple different things throughout the gym launch course and we want to make sure that you have Woofoo setup and you have the pro version of it because you'll be needing the pro version to do things like put redirect links from the form to a different site and things like that so we want to get set up with pro. So you will start off by visiting woofoo.com and you will end up clicking on sign up for free. We're not going to do the pro sign up because that allows you or makes you pay annually and we want the option down the road to pay monthly so let's click on sign up for free. Alright once we are there we have to enter in your email address. It has to be a valid one because it's going to send you an email to verify and you have to verify it or it is not going to let you proceed. So then you will put in your password and then you want to pick a username so this is going to be what is at the end of your URL so it'll be woofoo.com backslash and then whatever you put here. Okay so it's not going to let me proceed because I'm already have an account but you would click up you would click on sign up for free and it will end up taking you to a button that says verify my email. That's all it says so then you will go to your email and you will click on the button that it sends you in the email that says verify your email. Once you do that it will say email address verification is successful. Awesome now we want to click on return to login and we are going to sign in with the account that we just created. Alright so now we are signing into woofoo. All we have left to do for this video is going to be upgrading it so it will show you that you just have the one user zero out of five forms. Let's click over here where it says current plan. We want to click on the little I and whoops and click upgrade. Alright so the starter plan is going to be perfectly fine. Here is the toggle where you can switch between monthly and annual if you want to save money by purchasing the annual plan or you can use the monthly plan. I typically use the monthly plan because you never know if technology is going to change and maybe woofoo stops offering a certain service or something like that but it's totally up to you. The starter is all we are going to need. If you ever get to a point where you need more than 10 forms it will prompt you to upgrade to professional but 10 forms should be plenty for our purposes. So then you want to click on upgrade. Enter your billing information here and that is it. Once you click continue it will take you right back to the dashboard and you will then have the pro version of your account and we can start using that to continue building what we need to build.
